mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM assignment a INNER JOIN class_student_rel csr ON a.class_id = csr.class_id WHERE a.problem_set_id = #{problemSetId} AND csr.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.is_del = 0 AND csr.is_del = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN class_student_rel csr ON ccr.class_id = csr.class_id WHERE ccr.contest_id = #{contestId} AND csr.user_id = #{userId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND csr.is_del = 0
